posts.cookedHtml:
Join Shaked Hershkovitz (monday.com) and Noam Lapidot (spot-nik) for a live walkthrough of Inventory management on monday.com based on spot-nik app!

You’ll see how to run inventory across multiple sites, collaborate with your team, and also manage assets with serial/unique IDs from end to end—right inside monday.com.
